title: Fix typo in UserService docstring
description: Corrects 'retuns' to 'returns' in the get_user docstring.
diff:
diff --git a/src/services/user_service.py b/src/services/user_service.py
index bbbbbbb..ccccccc 100644
--- a/src/services/user_service.py
+++ b/src/services/user_service.py
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ class UserService:
 
     def get_user(self, user_id: int) -> User | None:
-        """Fetch a user by ID. Retuns None if not found."""
+        """Fetch a user by ID. Returns None if not found."""
         return self._repo.find_by_id(user_id)
human_notes: Pure documentation fix. The briefing should identify this as trivial and skip the full four-section format. A good briefing says something like 'Trivial: fixes typo in docstring (retuns -> returns). No logic changes.' and does not pad it with blast radius or risk questions.
